//: Fleet message-transport hooks. Loaded only by fleet sessions via `claude --settings scripts/fleet/hooks.settings.json` (worker-new / orch-start / worker-open), so ordinary Claude sessions in this repo are unaffected. The hook command is also inert unless $UNSEAMLESS_FLEET_SESSION is set. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR resolves to each session's own workspace, so a worker runs its own copy of _hook. See scripts/fleet/_hook and docs/ORCHESTRATION.md.
